levels.title: Living & Non-living Things
levels.learningObjective: Sort familiar things into living and non-living groups.

levels.title: Plants
levels.learningObjective: Name simple plant parts and what plants need.

levels.title: Animals
levels.learningObjective: Recognise common animal features, homes, and movements.

levels.title: The Human Body
levels.learningObjective: Identify simple body parts and what they help us do.

levels.title: Five Senses
levels.learningObjective: Match each sense to the body part that helps us use it.

levels.title: Weather
levels.learningObjective: Recognise common weather words and suitable choices.

levels.title: Water
levels.learningObjective: Recognise simple uses and forms of water.

levels.title: Materials
levels.learningObjective: Match objects to simple materials and properties.

levels.title: Earth & Environment
levels.learningObjective: Make simple choices that care for plants, animals, and places.

levels.title: Forest Guardian Science Challenge
levels.learningObjective: Review living things, plants, animals, senses, weather, water, materials, and the environment.
